activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Audit log of mount, auth, and drive events
activity.noEvents: No events match the current filter.
settings.title: Preferences
settings.subtitle: Local settings · stored in Windows Credential Manager and app data directory
onboarding.tagline: NanoCrew Sync turns Wasabi, S3 and other S3-compatible stores into native drive letters. Open files in any app, stream large media, and keep your credentials in the OS keychain.
onboarding.bullet1: Mounts like Z:\ — every Windows app sees it as local
onboarding.bullet2: Bring-your-own storage — we never touch your data
onboarding.bullet3: Free for everyone, forever during beta
onboarding.heading: Sign in to continue
onboarding.instructions: Enter your local NanoCrew Sync credentials.
setup.tagline: This account is stored locally on this machine. It controls access to NanoCrew Sync and all mounted drives.
setup.bullet3: S3 keys stored in Windows Credential Manager
setup.heading: Set up your account
setup.instructions: You only need to do this once. Additional users can be added later.
setup.errorShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
dashboard.winfspHint: WinFsp is required to mount drives. Download it from
dashboard.winfspHintCont: and install, then restart NanoCrew Sync.
dashboard.credentialHint: Use the ⋯ menu on the drive row to remove it, then add it again.
dashboard.connectSub: Mount Wasabi, S3, or B2 as a local drive letter.
dashboard.col.name: Drive name
